items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding 'Deposit collection vs full payment'. However, the evidence provided does not confirm whether the scenario was executed or what the specific outcomes were. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide sufficient detail to ascertain if the expected result was achieved, leading to an inconclusive status.
